app_release_notes: v1.1.1 - A rifle you set up now saves to your Rifles library right away, so you can come back and finish the ladder later. Plus a faster, clearer check for your saved loads when you start a New Ladder.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.1.1 - A rifle you set up now saves to your Rifles library right away, so you can come back and finish the ladder later. Plus a faster, clearer check for your saved loads when you start a New Ladder.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.1.0 - New Compare Loads page: pick saved loads from the same rifle and see which powder and charge shot best, scored on velocity SD, mean radius, and vertical SD. Plus Library cleanup: delete saved loads, bullets, rifles, and barrels you no longer want.
